creator: decke@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 194198
addonfix

Attached patch fixes support for FreeBSD addons to have correct architecture.

This has been runtime tested with multimedia/kodi-addon-pvr-hts [1]. That code part has been greatly rewritten in kodi 18.0 so upstreaming that patch makes no sense I think.


[1] https://code.bluelife.at/decke/ports/src/branch/master/multimedia/kodi-addon-pvr-hts
